content:
pub struct ServiceStatus {
    pub name: String,
    pub state: ServiceState,
    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = "Option::is_none")]
    pub port: Option<u16>,
    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = "Option::is_none")]
    pub latency_ms: Option<f64>,
}
pub struct SpanStats {
    pub count: u64,
    pub count_1h: u64,
    pub avg_ms: f64,
    pub last_ms: f64,
    pub errors: u64,
    #[serde(default)]
    pub p50_ms: f64,
    #[serde(default)]
    pub p95_ms: f64,
    #[serde(default)]
    pub p99_ms: f64,
}
